'''Blackmoon Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] unit in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Blackmoon Squadron was made up of [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]], and crewmembers reshuffled from [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|Green Squadron]]. The Blackmoons were based on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], where they served alongside [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]]. The [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] went on to become one of the elite squadrons of the New Republic/Galactic Alliance military, serving at the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]] and the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]]. The unit was originally named Green Squadron and commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Yakown Reth]]. Following his relief of duty due to battle-stress-induced paranoia, Blackmoon Squadron came under the command of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and later [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saz]], who led the squadron through the rest of the war.
